title: Therapy Record Schema v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Schema And Tooling Phase Inventory v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Schema validation does not make a therapy record medical advice.
The schema does not accept treatment recommendations, option rankings, dosing, eligibility, availability claims for any person, expanded-access guidance, trial matching, or real case data.
The schema does not prove efficacy, safety, availability, eligibility, indication, sequencing, appropriateness, or patient fit.
The template is public placeholder data only.
